# Dark Fantasy Platformer Bestiary Notice

- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/dark-fantasy-platformer-bestiary
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
- Local path: `godot/assets/third_party/dark_fantasy_bestiary`
- Project usage: enemy and boss sprites cropped from the provided PNG sheets.
- Attribution names recorded on the source page include Ansimuz, Redshrike, Evert, Pufalotti, Balmer, Calciumtrice, EmceeFlesher, Sparky, Surt, and Thompson.

These assets replace the Kenney Monster Builder runtime enemy visuals. The Kenney monster parts are no longer referenced by playable chapter data.
